title: 3-Day Sahara Desert Adventure
description: Journey from Marrakech through the Atlas Mountains to the golden dunes of Merzouga. Sleep under the stars in a luxury desert camp.

itinerary.title: Marrakech to Dades Valley
itinerary.description: Cross the Tizi n'Tichka pass, visit Ait Ben Haddou kasbah, overnight in Dades.

itinerary.title: Dades to Merzouga
itinerary.description: Explore Todra Gorge, arrive at Erg Chebbi dunes, camel trek to desert camp.

itinerary.title: Sunrise & Return
itinerary.description: Sunrise over the dunes, return journey through Ziz Valley to Marrakech.

seo.title: 3-Day Sahara Desert Adventure
seo.description: Journey from Marrakech through the Atlas Mountains to the golden dunes of Merzouga. Sleep under the stars in a luxury desert camp.

title: 7-Day Imperial Cities Tour
description: Discover Morocco's four imperial cities: Casablanca, Rabat, Fes, and Marrakech. A cultural immersion through history and architecture.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Casablanca
itinerary.description: Visit Hassan II Mosque, explore the Art Deco downtown.

itinerary.title: Rabat
itinerary.description: Explore the Kasbah of the Udayas, Hassan Tower, and Royal Palace.

itinerary.title: Meknes & Volubilis
itinerary.description: Visit the imperial city of Meknes and Roman ruins of Volubilis.

itinerary.title: Fes Medina
itinerary.description: Guided tour of the world's largest car-free urban area.

itinerary.title: Fes Experiences
itinerary.description: Cooking class, tannery visit, artisan workshops.

itinerary.title: Travel to Marrakech
itinerary.description: Scenic drive through Middle Atlas, arrive in Marrakech.

itinerary.title: Marrakech
itinerary.description: Explore Jemaa el-Fnaa, souks, Majorelle Garden.

seo.title: 7-Day Imperial Cities Tour
seo.description: Discover Morocco's four imperial cities: Casablanca, Rabat, Fes, and Marrakech. A cultural immersion through history and architecture.

title: 2-Day Chefchaouen Blue City Escape
description: Get lost in the mesmerizing blue streets of Chefchaouen. Perfect for photography lovers and those seeking tranquility.

itinerary.title: Explore the Blue Medina
itinerary.description: Wander through the blue-washed streets, visit the Kasbah, enjoy local cuisine.

itinerary.title: Spanish Mosque & Waterfalls
itinerary.description: Sunrise at Spanish Mosque viewpoint, optional hike to Akchour Waterfalls.

seo.title: 2-Day Chefchaouen Blue City Escape
seo.description: Get lost in the mesmerizing blue streets of Chefchaouen. Perfect for photography lovers and those seeking tranquility.

title: 5-Day Luxury Marrakech Retreat
description: Indulge in the finest riads, private cooking classes, spa treatments, and exclusive experiences in the Red City.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Riad Welcome
itinerary.description: Private airport transfer, luxury riad check-in, evening welcome dinner.

itinerary.title: Medina & Souks
itinerary.description: Private guide through the medina, exclusive souk shopping experience.

itinerary.title: Spa & Cooking
itinerary.description: Traditional hammam spa, private cooking class with a local chef.

itinerary.title: Atlas Mountains Day Trip
itinerary.description: Helicopter tour over the Atlas, lunch at a mountain lodge.

itinerary.title: Majorelle & Departure
itinerary.description: Private visit to Majorelle Garden, farewell brunch.

seo.title: 5-Day Luxury Marrakech Retreat
seo.description: Indulge in the finest riads, private cooking classes, spa treatments, and exclusive experiences in the Red City.

title: 3-Day Essaouira Coastal Adventure
description: Windsurf, explore the historic medina, enjoy fresh seafood, and experience the bohemian vibe of Morocco's wind city.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Medina
itinerary.description: Explore the UNESCO-listed medina, visit the Skala fortress, sunset at the port.

itinerary.title: Windsurfing & Beach
itinerary.description: Morning windsurfing lesson, afternoon horse riding on the beach.

itinerary.title: Sidi Kaouki & Departure
itinerary.description: Day trip to Sidi Kaouki beach, fresh seafood lunch, return to Marrakech.

seo.title: 3-Day Essaouira Coastal Adventure
seo.description: Windsurf, explore the historic medina, enjoy fresh seafood, and experience the bohemian vibe of Morocco's wind city.

title: 5-Day Budget Morocco Explorer
description: See the best of Morocco without breaking the bank. Hostels, local transport, and authentic experiences.

itinerary.title: Marrakech Arrival
itinerary.description: Check into hostel, explore Jemaa el-Fnaa, street food dinner.

itinerary.title: Marrakech Exploration
itinerary.description: Free walking tour, Bahia Palace, Koutoubia, souk browsing.

itinerary.title: Essaouira Day Trip
itinerary.description: Local bus to Essaouira, explore the medina and port.

itinerary.title: Agafay Desert
itinerary.description: Budget-friendly quad biking in Agafay, Berber dinner.

itinerary.title: Markets & Departure
itinerary.description: Morning market visit, last-minute shopping, departure.

seo.title: 5-Day Budget Morocco Explorer
seo.description: See the best of Morocco without breaking the bank. Hostels, local transport, and authentic experiences.

seo.title: 4 Days in Zazat
seo.description: A short Morocco itinerary through Zazat, Fint, and Tabont.
